name: Denver
tagline: Mile-High Mountain Living, Craft Beer Culture, and 300 Days of Sunshine
description: Denver sits at the foot of the Rocky Mountains, offering FIRE retirees an unmatched combination of outdoor adventure, urban culture, and over 300 days of sunshine per year. The city has evolved far beyond its frontier roots into a sophisticated metro with a thriving craft beer scene, excellent farm-to-table dining, and world-class skiing just 90 minutes away. Housing costs have climbed significantly in recent years but remain well below coastal cities, and Colorado's flat state income tax keeps the overall tax burden moderate. For anyone who values hiking, biking, skiing, and an active lifestyle, Denver is hard to beat.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – typical for a mid-size US city, improving in many neighborhoods
quickFacts.climate: Continental semi-arid with cold, dry winters and warm summers

housing.description: 1BR apartment in Montbello, Westwood, or outer Aurora

dining.description: Brewery taprooms and casual eateries 2-3x/week; mostly cooking at home

healthcare.description: Connect for Health Colorado Silver plan; Colorado premiums are moderate

transportation.description: Paid-off car with basic insurance and gas; RTD light rail for downtown commutes

entertainment.description: Free hiking on hundreds of Front Range trails, city parks, free brewery tours

1M.lifestyle: Denver on a $1M budget requires discipline but rewards you with the outdoors. You will live in a modest apartment outside the trendy core, but the Rocky Mountain foothills are free and endlessly accessible. Brewery taprooms offer affordable socializing, and the dry climate keeps utility bills relatively low. Skiing is a splurge at this budget, but hiking season lasts most of the year.

housing.description: 2BR apartment in Capitol Hill, Baker, or a townhome in Sloan's Lake

dining.description: Dining out 3-4x/week at mid-range restaurants in RiNo and LoDo; weekend brunch spots

healthcare.description: Connect for Health Gold plan with dental and vision; access to UCHealth and SCL Health

transportation.description: Reliable car with full coverage, RTD pass, bike-share membership for summer

entertainment.description: Ski day passes at Loveland or A-Basin, Red Rocks concerts, Rockies games, gym membership

2M.lifestyle: At $2M, Denver starts to feel like home. You can afford a comfortable apartment in a walkable neighborhood like Capitol Hill or Baker, enjoy the booming RiNo food scene regularly, and actually hit the slopes a few times each winter. Red Rocks concerts become a summer staple, and you have enough margin to fully embrace the active, outdoor-centric lifestyle Denver is famous for.

housing.description: 3BR home in Wash Park, a modern condo in LoDo, or a house in Highlands

dining.description: Regular dining at top Denver restaurants like Beckon, Guard and Grace, and The Wolf's Tailor

healthcare.description: Premium private health insurance with comprehensive coverage and low deductibles

transportation.description: Late-model SUV for mountain trips, premium insurance, occasional rideshare

entertainment.description: Ikon Pass for unlimited skiing, Broncos season tickets, Red Rocks VIP, premium gym

3M.lifestyle: Life at $10K per month in Denver is outstanding. A beautiful home in Wash Park or the Highlands, regular dinners at the city's best restaurants, an Ikon Pass for unlimited skiing at Vail and Copper Mountain, and Broncos season tickets. Denver's combination of urban sophistication and immediate mountain access creates a lifestyle that is hard to find anywhere else in the country.

housing.description: Luxury home in Cherry Creek, a penthouse in LoDo, or a modern estate in Hilltop

dining.description: Private chef for entertaining, fine dining multiple nights per week, exclusive wine dinners

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine at UCHealth, executive health screenings, premium private insurance

transportation.description: Luxury SUV for mountain trips, second vehicle, premium insurance, occasional private car service

entertainment.description: Premium Broncos suite, Cherry Creek Country Club membership, heli-skiing trips, arts patronage

domesticHelp.description: Bi-weekly house cleaning, landscaping, snow removal service, occasional personal assistant tasks

luxuryExtras.description: Mountain cabin weekends, first-class ski trips, quarterly travel, premium wine and spirits collecting

5M.lifestyle: At $5M, Denver delivers the ultimate mountain-city lifestyle. A stunning home in Cherry Creek or a sleek LoDo penthouse, regular dinners at the finest restaurants, a luxury SUV loaded for weekend escapes to Aspen or Telluride, and deep involvement in Denver's growing arts and cultural scene. The mountains are your backyard and the city is your playground.

housing.description: Cherry Hills Village estate, Polo Club mansion, or luxury penthouse in Union Station district

dining.description: Full-time personal chef, catered events, private dining experiences, exclusive wine dinners

healthcare.description: Top concierge medical practice at UCHealth, executive wellness programs, holistic health services

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, private car service, chartered flights from Centennial Airport

entertainment.description: Private box at Empower Field, major arts and hospital philanthropy, heli-skiing, international travel

domesticHelp.description: Full-time estate manager, housekeeper, personal assistant, property maintenance and snow removal crew

luxuryExtras.description: Mountain estate in Aspen or Vail, first-class international travel, art collecting, philanthropic giving

10M.lifestyle: At $10M, Denver is your gateway to the best of both worlds. A sprawling Cherry Hills estate with mountain views, a personal chef, a second home in Aspen, and the ability to charter flights from Centennial Airport for weekend getaways. You are deeply embedded in Denver's philanthropic community, with private boxes at Broncos and Avalanche games and the Rocky Mountains as your personal playground.
